title: Viktor Orbán's Hungarian experiment runs out of steam
summary_full: Péter Magyar's historic win offers peace for a country exhausted by the tensions of Viktor Orbán's rule,  Nick Thorpe reports from Budapest.
summary_public: Péter Magyar's historic win offers peace for a country exhausted by the tensions of Viktor Orbán's rule,  Nick Thorpe reports from Budapest.
